title: 3-Ingredient Banana Pancakes
summary: Start your day off properly with these super quick and healthy banana pancakes. Made with just three ingredients, they couldn’t be easier to make.

method.description: Crack the eggs into a blender then add the bananas and oats. Turn the blender onto a medium speed and blitz for 1-2 mins until the mixture is homogeneous and semi-smooth. Let it sit for 3 mins.
Warm a non-stick frying pan over a medium heat. Once hot, turn the heat down to low and add a small knob of butter. Once melted, add 4 tbsp of the mixture (for one large pancake).

Cook over a low heat for 1-2 mins until bubbles begin to appear. Flip and cook for another minute on the other side. Remove to a plate and cover with kitchen foil (or pop in the bottom shelf of a warm oven) to keep warm until serving. Repeat for the remaining mixture.
Serve with your choice of toppings! More banana slices, peanut butter and flaked toasted almonds are great.

chefs.name: Mob
chefs.summary: Mob is on a mission to instil a love of cooking in everyone, because we believe in the positive impact that it can have on people's lives.
